info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense Repository Service API
About
Qlik Sense Enterprise Get QRS API information

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves basic information about the QRS API including the build version and the database identifier.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get API endpoint descriptions

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: extended
params.description: Whether to return extended descriptions

params.name: method
params.description: Filter endpoints by HTTP method

params.name: format
params.description: Response format

items.docs: Retrieves a description of all available QRS API endpoints, optionally filtered by HTTP method and in an extended format.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get default values for all entity types

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: listentries
params.description: Whether to include list entries in the defaults

items.docs: Retrieves the default values for all entity types in the QRS, optionally including list entries.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get enumeration types

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves all enumeration types used across the QRS API, including their allowed values.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Invalidate cache

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Invalidates the QRS cache, forcing fresh data retrieval on subsequent requests. Use with caution as this impacts performance.

info.name: App
Qlik Sense Enterprise List applications

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using the syntax: property operator value. Supports operators like eq, ne, so, ew, sw. Example: name eq 'MyApp'

params.name: orderby
params.description: Property name to order results by, optionally followed by asc or desc.

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of Qlik Sense applications in condensed format, optionally filtered by a query expression.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List applications with full details

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using the syntax: property operator value. Supports operators like eq, ne, so, ew, sw. Example: name eq 'MyApp'

params.name: orderby
params.description: Property name to order results by, optionally followed by asc or desc.

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of Qlik Sense applications in full format including all properties, owner, stream, tags, and custom properties.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Count applications

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using the syntax: property operator value. Supports operators like eq, ne, so, ew, sw. Example: name eq 'MyApp'

items.docs: Returns the number of applications matching an optional filter expression.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get application by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

items.docs: Retrieves a single Qlik Sense application by its unique identifier, returned in full format.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Update application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

items.docs: Updates an existing Qlik Sense application. The complete entity including the unchanged modifiedDate must be provided in the request body.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Delete application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Permanently deletes a Qlik Sense application from the repository.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Import application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: name
params.description: Name for the imported application

params.name: keepdata
params.description: Whether to keep the data in the imported app

params.name: excludeconnections
params.description: Whether to exclude data connections from the imported app

items.docs: Imports a Qlik Sense application from a QVF file. The file is uploaded as the request body and the application name and other attributes are provided as query parameters.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Copy application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

params.name: name
params.description: Name for the copied application

params.name: includecustomproperties
params.description: Whether to include custom properties in the copy

items.docs: Creates a copy of an existing Qlik Sense application. Requires Read and Duplicate permissions on the source application.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Export application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

params.name: skipdata
params.description: Whether to exclude data from the exported file

items.docs: Exports a Qlik Sense application as a QVF file. Returns a download path that can be used to retrieve the exported file.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Publish application to a stream

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

params.name: stream
params.description: ID of the stream to publish the application to

params.name: name
params.description: Optional new name for the published application

items.docs: Publishes a Qlik Sense application to a specified stream, making it available to users with access to that stream.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Reload application data

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Triggers a reload of the application data from its connected data sources.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Replace application content

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

params.name: app
params.description: ID of the source application whose content replaces the target

items.docs: Replaces the content of a published application with the content from another application, preserving the published app's identity and stream membership.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Migrate application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Migrates an application to the current Qlik Sense version format.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get hub app list

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves the list of applications available in the hub for the authenticated user, including published and personal apps.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Upload application

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: name
params.description: Name for the uploaded application

params.name: keepdata
params.description: Whether to keep the data in the uploaded app

items.docs: Uploads a Qlik Sense application from a QVF binary file to the repository.

info.name: App Object
Qlik Sense Enterprise Publish application object

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Publishes an application object such as a sheet or story, making it available to all users who can access the application.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Unpublish application object

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Unpublishes an application object, reverting it to private status.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all server node configurations in condensed format.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get server node configuration by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier (GUID) of the entity

items.docs: Retrieves a single server node configuration by its unique identifier.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get local server node configuration

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Retrieves the server node configuration for the local node.

info.name: User Directory
Qlik Sense Enterprise List user directories

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter expression using the syntax: property operator value. Supports operators like eq, ne, so, ew, sw. Example: name eq 'MyApp'

params.name: privileges
params.description: Whether to append privilege information to the returned entities.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all configured user directory connectors.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Synchronize user directories

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key. Must be 16 arbitrary characters matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header value.

items.docs: Triggers a synchronization of all or specified user directories, importing updated user and group information.
